method: Qualitative severity scoring from NWS/NOAA documented events
note: Weather APIs blocked in sandbox; severity coded from authoritative sources

albums.label: High
albums.event: Extreme heat wave (heat index 105-116F across Midwest/NE, 60M under advisories) + derecho with 100mph winds across ND/MN
albums.source: NWS Fargo, NOAA Climate Report June 2018

albums.label: Moderate
albums.event: Hurricane Hanna intensifying in Gulf (Cat 1 landfall next day in TX) + severe flooding in SD

albums.label: Catastrophic
albums.event: Hurricane Ida Cat 4 landfall in Louisiana (150mph winds, 16ft storm surge, 1M without power, 92 deaths total)
albums.source: NWS New Orleans, Wikipedia: Hurricane Ida

albums.label: Catastrophic
albums.event: Hurricane Ida remnants devastate NE — record rainfall in NYC (3.15in/hr), first-ever flash flood emergency for NYC, 55+ deaths in NE
albums.source: NWS Sterling VA, Wikipedia: Effects of Ida in NE US

albums.label: Low
albums.event: Light rain/snow in northern MN, no significant nationwide event

albums.label: Low-Moderate
albums.event: 2 days after OK/TX tornado outbreak (13+ tornadoes May 4); residual unsettled weather
albums.source: NWS Norman, NOAA May 2022 Climate Report

albums.label: High
albums.event: Day after historic May 12 derecho (107mph gusts, 34 tornadoes, billion-dollar disaster); continued 60+mph winds, power outages
albums.source: NWS Fargo, Wikipedia: May 2022 Midwest Derecho

albums.label: High
albums.event: EF3 tornado hits Gaylord MI (2 killed, 44 injured) + baseball-sized hail

albums.label: Low
albums.event: Quiet weather nationally; widespread drought, low river levels

albums.label: Very High
albums.event: Major tornado outbreak: 31 tornadoes including two EF4s (TX/OK/AR/LA), 4 deaths, 55K without power, 600+ flights cancelled
albums.source: NWS Norman, Wikipedia: Nov 4-5 2022 Tornado Outbreak
